input.campaign_brief: Launch a back-to-school retail campaign for parents with a strong CTV and online video focus. Optimize toward completed events and keep measurement cross-screen.
Plan an automotive campaign for electric vehicle shoppers. Use premium cross-screen video and favor a curated supply path with strong reach measurement.
Build a streaming service launch campaign around live sports viewers. Prioritize premium video, a full-stack execution path, and attention as the main KPI.
Create an efficient travel prospecting campaign across video and display. Keep the plan measurable and emphasize viewability and unified identity where possible.
Develop a QSR awareness campaign around sports viewing moments and restaurant visits. Keep it CTV-led and avoid weak supply paths for premium inventory.
Design a brand campaign for a new video service, combining audience discovery, activation, and measurement in one workflow. Use a unified path rather than fragmented buying.
